title: haageocereus rauhii var. laticornua
intro: Haageocereus rauhii var. laticornua is a variety of Haageocereus rauhii, a type of columnar cactus native to Mexico. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiparasitic properties, making it useful in treating wounds, infections, and gastrointestinal issues. The health benefits of Haageocereus rauhii var. laticornua include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and creams, which are used topically to treat skin conditions and internally to support digestive health.
